summary: Completed backend + frontend verification against public preview URL for live Shopify catalog integration. Shop listing, Rings/Grills category filtering, product detail navigation, and Shopify readiness connected state all passed.
action_items: No blocking fixes required for requested scope.
Optional hardening: replace blocking requests.get calls in async backend flow with async HTTP client to avoid event-loop blocking under high traffic.
critical_code_review_comments: Live integration is active (catalog returned 42 products on public URL, readiness reports connection_ready=true).
Backend fetch_shopify_resource uses synchronous requests.get inside async endpoints; this is a scalability/performance risk though not a functional failure in current tests.
Frontend API base URL usage is correct via process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL and /api prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified on https://shopify-gems-2.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend pytest: 8/8 pass on test_storefront_api.py and 4/4 pass on new live-integration suite. UI automation confirmed shop products render, Rings and Grillz->Grills category filters return populated grids, and first Grills product opens detail page successfully.
rca of the issue: No defect reproduced in requested scope. Initial UI script failed once due to incorrect selector pattern for nested 'View detail' link; rerun with direct data-testid button selector succeeded, confirming functionality is working.
